creator: bsd@quentb.com
text:
Created attachment 227070
Example obhttpd.conf file

I was trying to override a MIME type using the "types" option as described in the manual page for obhttpd.conf (https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=obhttpd.conf&manpath=FreeBSD+13.0-RELEASE+and+Ports) and found that adding any types block results in a syntax error according to "obhttpd -n". 

Attached is the failing server config (used to present port-mgmt/synth logs). The configuration will be read successfully if the types block is removed.
